title: The Body Shop British Rose Essentials Gift Set (Shower Gel 250ml + Body Yogurt 200ml + Hand Cream 30ml), Floral Festive Trio with Rose Extract, Softening & Hydrating Body Care, Vegan
features: Floral gift set infused with elegant rose extract & shea butter.
Includes shower gel, fast-absorbing body yogurt & softening hand cream.
Leaves skin fresh, silky-soft & delicately fragranced.
Perfect gift for floral fragrance lovers at Christmas.
